ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "decimal_value" INTEGER /* Decimal representation of the character */,
  "binary_value" TEXT /* Binary representation of the character */,
  "octal_value" TEXT /* Octal representation of the character */,
  "hexadecimal_value" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the character */,
  "ascii_value" TEXT /* ASCII value of the character */,
  "unicode_value" TEXT /* Unicode value of the character */,
  "html_entity" TEXT /* HTML entity representation of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or note about the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the character set (e.g., ASCII, UTF-8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character set */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the character set standard */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicator if the character set is the default one */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character set entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character set entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "char_set_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character set */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicator if the character is a primary representation in the character set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_char_set_map_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES character_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_char_set_map_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the character */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the character data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the report data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last modified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
